message:
feat(testkit): AsyncTestContext for deterministic scenario correlation

Add async_harness module providing structured test context:
- AsyncTestContext with deterministic run_id, scenario_id, correlation_id
  generation using blake3 hashing for reproducible test identifiers
- for_scenario() constructor for convenient per-test context creation
- fcp-async-core and blake3 dependencies added to testkit

Update testkit docs and examples to show AsyncTestContext usage pattern
with #[fcp_async_core::runtime::test] attribute.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
